leagueBriefing: The semifinals are set after a historic night that saw the reigning champions fall and an underdog reach new heights. Venezuela pulled off a massive upset by knocking out Japan, while Italy continued its undefeated dream run to punch its first-ever ticket to the final four.

games.headline: Italy continues historic unbeaten run to reach first WBC semifinal
games.brief: Italy’s improbable Cinderella story just added its most impressive chapter yet. Despite an early leadoff blast from Puerto Rico, the Azzurri responded immediately with a four-run first inning that chased starter Seth Lugo before he could even record two outs. Italy's relentless offense built an 8-2 lead by the fourth, and while they had to sweat out a bases-loaded jam in the eighth, they held on to remain undefeated and secure the deepest tournament run in the program's history.
bullets: Vinnie Pasquantino, Dominic Canzone, and Jac Caglianone fueled the first-inning rally with three consecutive RBI singles.
Sam Aldegheri earned the win on the mound, while Greg Weissert locked down a five-out save to stifle the late Puerto Rican comeback.
The game made WBC history as the first time both leadoff hitters (Willi Castro for PR and Italy's response) resulted in such explosive opening frames.
Andrew Fischer and J.J. D'Orazio broke the game open in the fourth with back-to-back two-run doubles.
games.context: Italy advances to its first-ever World Baseball Classic semifinal, where they will face Venezuela in Miami.

highlights.title: Puerto Rico vs. Italy 2026 World Baseball Classic | Game Highlights

games.headline: Venezuela stuns Japan to dethrone reigning World Baseball Classic champs
games.brief: The reign of Japan is over. In a heavyweight battle that lived up to the hype, Venezuela overcame a mid-game deficit to knock out the defending champions. After trailing 5-2 against ace Yoshinobu Yamamoto, the Venezuelan lineup exploded against the Japanese bullpen, led by a go-ahead home run from Wilyer Abreu in the sixth. Venezuela's relief corps then slammed the door, silencing the Tokyo crowd and ending Japan's bid for a fourth title in dramatic fashion.
bullets: Ronald Acuña Jr. set the tone early with a massive leadoff home run off Yoshinobu Yamamoto.
Wilyer Abreu delivered the decisive blow with a home run in the sixth inning to reclaim the lead for Venezuela.
Daniel Palencia secured the historic victory by striking out Shohei Ohtani for the final out of the game.
The win marks Venezuela's first trip to the WBC semifinals in 17 years, ending Japan's streak of reaching the final four in every previous tournament.
games.context: Venezuela eliminates the defending champions and advances to the semifinals for the first time since 2009.

highlights.title: Venezuela vs. Japan 2026 World Baseball Classic | Game Highlights
